name: python3-typing-inspection
title: python3-typing-inspection
summary: Tools to inspect Python type annotations at runtime
description:
Tools to inspect Python type annotations at runtime
This package provides low-level functions to check if a variable is a
"typing" object, and high-level introspection utilities used to inspect
type annotations that take runtime edge cases into account.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-typing-inspection because Tools to inspect Python type annotations at runtime.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-typing-inspection as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-typing-inspection with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-typing-inspection --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
